title: Shes just chillin there
wikitext:
[]: She's just chillin there (SPOILING tier Spoilers)             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Nov 02, 2009 2:41 am So, during the final scene of 2.0, while Shinji is ending the world to save Rei and all of Nerv is in awe, we are shown a quick shot of Lilith, just chillin Was it a shot to draw parallels? Foreshadowing? Irony? Why is Lilith chillin?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Nov 02, 2009 2:52 am Foreshadowing: "With the awakening of Eva-01, the time for Lilith's rebirth and the fulfillment of the Covenant and blah blah blah is at hand."

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Nov 02, 2009 1:28 pm it should have been another telephone pole shot imo, those things are obviously the real bad guys

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Nov 02, 2009 3:16 pm Axell wrote: it should have been another telephone pole shot imo, those things are obviously the real bad guys

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Nov 02, 2009 5:36 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Axell wrote: it should have been another telephone pole shot imo, those things are obviously the real bad guys

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon Nov 02, 2009 7:05 pm They know what they did but on topic, do we know for sure that is our Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryjin » Mon Nov 02, 2009 7:07 pm I think it was to show what was happening has a relation to Lilith, since basically it ended with Rei who (unless they decided to change it) is the vassal for liliths soul merging with Eva 01 who is a "clone" of Lilith which I'm guessing means she now complete again and awaking and that's what causing 3 Impact this time.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Mon Nov 02, 2009 8:21 pm Well right after lilith we see this [URL=http://img59.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap40013.png/] [/URL] Wich on closer inspection looks like this [URL=http://img22.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap18139.png/] [/URL] tthat bears a striking resemblence to Eva 08 [URL=http://img337.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap17644.png/] [/URL] So maybe 08 is the reawakened version of Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Nov 02, 2009 8:51 pm Whow, I never noticed that....Hmmm...Wonder what that means. Dunn Dun Dunnn.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Nov 02, 2009 10:32 pm Lagann wrote: Well right after lilith we see this [URL=http://img59.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap40013.png/] [/URL] Wich on closer inspection looks like this [URL=http://img22.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap18139.png/] [/URL] tthat bears a striking resemblence to Eva 08 [URL=http://img337.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap17644.png/] [/URL] So maybe 08 is the reawakened version of Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 02, 2009 10:45 pm I think the shot of Lilith is meant to show she's not causing 3I/doing anything in contrast to Rei/Eva-00 & Eva-01/Yui who are. To emphasize Rei needs to return to Lilith first (also, Misato's 1.0 line of "an Angel reaching Lilith will cause 3I"), I'd guess.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Nov 02, 2009 10:47 pm Lagann wrote: [URL=http://img337.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap17644.png/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Mon Nov 02, 2009 11:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I think the shot of Lilith is meant to show she's not causing 3I/doing anything in contrast to Rei/Eva-00 & Eva-01/Yui who are. To emphasize Rei needs to return to Lilith first (also, Misato's 1.0 line of "an Angel reaching Lilith will cause 3I"), I'd guess.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:52 am I'm waiting for the incredibly hilarious twist of Lilith doing absolute NOTHING the entirety of Rebuild, and in the final shot, after the credits roll, we see the same shot of Lilith, with an unsettling quiet.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Nov 03, 2009 2:10 am That's not Lilith, that's Ada-*gets hit with a brick in the face*

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 6:21 am It's not Lillith it's Mari and the Mari we think we know is Adam and Kaworu is a part of the FAR this time.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Nov 03, 2009 3:46 pm they're ALL the same FAR.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Nov 03, 2009 5:49 pm You expect her to simply get off from the cross and walk over to the Evangelion Unit 01/Zeruel/Naked Rei fuck up of a mess and have hot sex with it? Actually, that would be interesting but I wouldn't expect that to happen at all. Most likely, its foreshadowing, plus the fact that Lilith has something to do with what's happening with Unit-01. Best I can think of is Third Impact about to happen with the Angels controlling it, so they have a shot of Lilith to show the impending doom upon all of humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Nov 03, 2009 6:06 pm After all the stuff happens in Rebuild and everything is over, Instrumentality doesn't happen, and Lilith is completly ignored. Bored and short on change to buy a Kit Kat, Gendo decides to pawn her off on eBay.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 03, 2009 7:26 pm Ever think that maybe it does not mean anything, I'm sure it does but there is a chance it doesn't.
